stemHtml:
Which of the following statements are correct with regards to the approach climb, in accordance with "CS 25.121 Climb: One-engine-inoperative"?

1. Up to 2 or 3 degrees of bank angle towards the operating engine may be used
2. The airspeed may not be less than 1.5 VSR
3. The minimum climb gradient is 2.4% for four-engine aircraft
4. The minimum gradient is 2.1% for two-engine aircraft
5. The airspeed may not be greater than 1.4 VSR
6. The bank angle is limited to 5 degrees towards the operating engine
